titleStmt.title: SII 16.152: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 152. (A.R. No. 339 of 1922.) MULAKALACHERUVU, MADANAPALLI TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the Kanagoṇḍarāyasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1468, Parābhava, Nija-Āshāḍha śu. 11, Prathama-ēkādaśi corresponding to 1546 A.D., July 9, (Friday), °64.
It records the gift of wet lands to God Tiruveṅgaḷanātha of Kanugoṇḍa, by Yaragaṅgiraḍi, son of Mudireḍi-Māramareḍi of Sōṁpalya-agrahāra.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī ja
yādbhudhaya śālivāhana śa
ka va¨rṣaṁbulu 1468 Agu
nēṭi parābhava saṁvatsara nija
Āṣāḍha śu 11 lu śrīmaṁma
hārājādhirāja rājaparamē
śvara śrī vīrapratāpa śrī sadāsi
va mahārāyalu pṛthivīsāṁbrā
jyaṁ śēyucuṁḍagānu śrīmattu ca
tu¨rbhuvanādhīśvara Akhilāṁḍa
kōṭibraṁhmāṁḍḍanāyaka garu
ḍanārāyaṇa vēdavēdāṁttavēdya
śrī purāṇapuruṣōttamulaina
kanugoṁḍa tiruvēṁgaḷanāṁtha
dēvuniki sōṁpalya Agrahāraṁ mudi
raḍi māramareḍi koḍuku yaragaṁgi ra
ḍiṁgāru daṁḍaṁ veṭi dadhyannavasarāna
ku sama¨rppiṁciyiccina maḍiki viva
raṁ mulukalaceruvu grāmaṁ pedace
ruvu venakanu stānaṁvāri cātanu ne
mu khaṁḍabhōgyaṁgānu peṭi Aravaiyi
varahālaku bhōgyaṁ peṭṭina bhomma
rāju paṁdoṁmaṁdumu ma

ḍinni yi prathamayēkādasi pu
ṇyakālamaṁdu da(ṁ)dhyanna Ava
sarānakunnu sama¨rppiṁci mūla
pa(ṁ)trālunu yistimi gānuka
svāmi yī śāva Ācaṁdrā¨rka
ṁgānu Avadhariṁppagalavāru stā
naṁvāru laṁgānu pucu
koṁna lōni
Avadhariṁcē
Aṁduku yistimi yī dha¨rmmaśāsa
naṁ . dānapālanayō¨rmmadhyē
yō nṛpālanaṁ dānātsva¨rgama
Digital edition of SII 16.152 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
